What We Covered In This Module:
✓ Elements Of A Good Niche/Market!
✓ Assessing the Marketplace Sophistication!
✓ Developing a Unique Mechanism!
✓ Assessing the Competitive Landscape!
✓ Developing your 6FFF Hook!
✓ Developing your 6FFF 	Promise
Module 1

-- 1 of 2 --

What To Do Now:
1. 	Analyze your Niche/Market Ideas against the criteria!
2. 	Review the current and past Hooks & Promises of your Top 10
Competitors to understand your markets’ sophistication level!
3. 	Review competitors current offers to better understand the
Competitive Landscape!
4. 	Brainstorm your 6FFF Hook!
5. 	Brainstorm your 6FFF Promise
